title: taraxacum neosivaschicum
intro: Taraxacum neosivaschicum, also known as the Sivas dandelion or Japanese dandelion, is a species of dandelion native to East Asia. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties such as diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, offering health benefits such as reducing blood pressure and improving liver function. Taraxacum neosivaschicum is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it can also be consumed as a fresh salad green or used as a food ingredient in various dishes.
